creationDate.description: The creation date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

domains.description: The domains the user has access to. Only available if `hasAllDomains` is false.

hasAllDomains.description: Indicates if the user has access to all domains. If false, the configured domains are returned in the `domains` property.

isActive.description: Indicates if the user is active or inactive and can no longer login.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

permissions.description: The permissions assigned to this user.

items.description: The permissions assigned to this user.

roles.description: The roles assigned to this user.
